ratings.comment: Hasan is a very straight forward lecturer, but also likes to crack jokes sometimes. His exams are based purely off of readings and lecture so if you complete those, you're fine. His exams were composed completely of "select the incorrect answer..." questions which we all told him we hated, but he did it anyways. Material is interesting!

Hasan is a super cool guy.  Gives decent lectures but you have to be somewhat interested in genetics and new technology in this field in order to stay on top of things.  Assigns dense scientific articles to read for homework. Graded discussion group worksheets most class periods. Willing to work with you if you have to miss class!
